goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'el shaddai'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '7 people' and '2 nights' starting from 'friday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stevenage' and should 'arrive by 13:00'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called el shaddai
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 2 nights starting from friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to stevenage and should arrive by 13:00
The train should leave on sunday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get price and departure time
